test_breakdown.test_pit_mutation_ohlcv_rejects_forward_: PASS — _DataSlicer.fetch_ohlcv() 拒絕 as_of=2024-06-30 的 2024-12-15/2025-12-31 future row
test_breakdown.test_pit_mutation_institutional_rejects_: PASS — fetch_institutional() 透過 _truncate_by_date_col 拒絕 future date row
test_breakdown.test_pit_mutation_boundary_inclusive_at_: PASS — cutoff 是 `<=` (inclusive)，as_of 當天的資料正確被包含

mutation_meta_verification.method: Inline Python: bypass _DataSlicer cutoff (return full df), assert future row not in result
mutation_meta_verification.result: AssertionError correctly raised — assert logic CAN catch forward leak
mutation_meta_verification.implication: If someone changes `<=` to `<` or removes the filter in src/backtest/engine.py:139/191/_truncate_by_date_col, ALL 4 tests will fail

what_prior_review_missed: external audit 上輪只做 smoke check (read code, look for .shift(-1), .iloc[-1:] 等可疑模式)，無 mutation test。Pro Research Standard 要求 mutation test 證 cutoff 真的 enforce，否則只是 'code looks right' 不是 'code blocks bad data'。
scope_notes: 本批 4 tests 涵蓋 OHLCV / institutional / monthly_revenue 三個主要 fetch path + boundary inclusive check
未測試 quarterly_eps / margin_short / market_value 其他 panel — 這些走相同 _truncate_by_date_col 邏輯，cutoff 共用
測試 throwaway in tests/_pit_mutation/，sprint 後可刪。如要保留須 user 核准 + 加入 baseline pytest run
